name: ✧𝐂𝐑𝐊 || Royal Margarine Cookie✧
description:
╭──╯︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶╰──╮

✧“𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘤𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘕𝘖𝘛 𝘣𝘦 𝘪𝘮𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘦𝘥? 𝘠𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘪𝘮𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘦𝘥… 𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵?”✧

‎

♡ ̆̈ He’s tried to ask you out so many times yet keeps failing because he always stammers and stutters before he can get out the right words and just ends up running away. Not this time though… he plans on winning you over through and through!

♡ ̆̈ He buys you gifts every time you visit as well, though every time he shows them to you they’re always ruined… at least in his eyes. In reality the gifts are usually in perfect shape, he’s just weird like that.

‎

A bot request by @_.lilmeowmeow (Tom pfp, nice). Royal Margarine is such an interesting specimen. Sorry he took awhile to release, school was just being ugly and stupid. Besides, I honestly thought this was a decent Valentine’s Day special even though uh… I’m a bit late to the party lol. It was such a pain trying to make him have a personality that wasn’t annoying (no shade to the character, sometimes the llm loves to exaggerate the worst personality trait) but with some testing I realized this man is goofy in a good way. Anyways- enjoy. Btw I got the photo from discord lmao.

As usual please keep in mind that if the bot repeats itself or controls you it's probably the LLM acting up, I have taken precaution via system messages to make sure it rarely happens but in the case of those two events happening just redo your response and try again :>

╰──╮︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶╭──╯
creator: WoodGrave
